title: Seed migration 002 — Clockwork personality
acceptance_criteria: 002_seed_clockwork.sql inserts one row into personality_configs using INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (name, version) DO NOTHING for idempotency

Row values: name='clockwork', version=1, is_active=TRUE, is_frozen=TRUE, entry_type='FIXED_TIME', management_style='HOLD', phase=1, min_probability=0.500, max_daily_trades=1, max_daily_loss=10000.00, entry_delay_secs=0, position_multiplier=1.0, adjustment_trigger_points=NULL, max_open_legs=2, reentry_min_probability=NULL, min_vix=0, max_vix=100, require_profit_gate=FALSE, profit_gate_amount=NULL, profit_gate_days=NULL, allow_reentry=FALSE, reentry_delay_mins=NULL, allowed_regimes=NULL, allowed_strategies='{1}'
A comment in the SQL explains: 'Clockwork is the permanent benchmark. is_frozen=TRUE means the evolution engine must raise FROZEN_VIOLATION and never modify any parameter on this row.'
Running bun run migrate twice produces exactly one Clockwork row (idempotent)
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
